---
title: "Welcome"
---

## Get your computer ready {footer=false}


<https://chendaniely.github.io/scipy-2026-shiny/setup.html>

![](/img/qr-setup.png){width="350px" fig-align="center"}

If you cloned the repository and did the installation update your materials with:

```bash
git pull origin main
```


## Today's goal

Learn how to build reactive web apps with Shiny for Python,
from the simple to the mission critical.

## Who's in the room?

Have you used...

::: {.incremental}
- Python?
- Data visualization in Python (matplotlib, plotnine, plotly, ...)?
- Interactive dashboards (Dash, Streamlit, Panel, ...)?
- Shiny for R?
- Shiny for Python?
:::

## Agenda {.smaller}

{{< include /_schedule.qmd >}}

## House rules

- Ask questions any time
- Help your neighbor - teaching is the best way to learn
- Stuck? Raise your hand - helpers are roaming the room
- Everything is at: <https://github.com/chendaniely/scipy-2026-shiny>
